prerequisites.value: Con 13, half-orc, orc ferocity racial trait.

description.value:
**Benefit:** You gain the ferocity universal monster ability, allowing you to continue fighting at negative hit points. When using this ability, you gain a +2 bonus on Intimidate checks.

**Normal:** A half-orc with the orc ferocity racial trait can fight for 1 more round after he is brought below 0 hit points. Support this Site – Buy this Book! This volume offers an indispensable analysis of the most vicious killers of all – orcs. Born and bred for war, they are an awful, brutish, violent species and, despite their constant infighting and backstabbing, their horde armies remain a dire threat to all races. Series: Open Book Adventures Paperback: 48 pages Publisher: Osprey Publishing (June 23, 2015) Click here to buy it or read more about it!
